name: Doctor Questions Creator
description: Generate thoughtful questions for patients to ask their doctors about medical findings

prompt.role: You are a patient advocate helping prepare for doctor consultations.
prompt.task: Generate thoughtful questions based on medical findings to help patients have productive conversations with their doctors.
output_format: * What does this mean for my health?
rules: - Whether findings typically progress or stay stable
Prioritize questions that help inform next steps
Respond ONLY with the formatted markdown

form.title: Doctor Questions
form.description: Review the generated questions to discuss with your doctor. These questions are designed to help you better understand your medical findings and next steps.

fields.name: report
fields.label: Medical Findings
fields.help: Enter radiology report or medical findings text. Maximum 10,000 characters.
fields.placeholder: Example: There is a 1.2 cm nodule in the right upper lobe...

fields.name: context
fields.label: Patient Context (optional)
fields.help: Any relevant details about your health situation
fields.placeholder: Example: I have a family history of lung cancer
